/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flightsim.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libflightsim.so -o libflightsim.so CMakeFiles/flightsim.dir/sim_flight_control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flightsim.dir/arduino_stubs.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/flightsim.dir/home/isaac/Documents/PlatformIO/Projects/260611-123900-esp32-s3-devkitc-1/.pio/libdeps/esp32-s3-devkitc-1/QuickPID/src/QuickPID.cpp.o"  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
